description:
Offered: every fourth semester
This writing studio course covers all aspects of developing, writing, and crafting articles that demonstrate effective use of slant, theme, voice, and viewpoint. Students practice interview and research techniques and write in several major sub-genres of magazine features such as profiles, Q&A’s, op-eds, and service pieces. () Cross-listed with ENGL 3870
Prerequisite(s): ENGL 1200 or HON 1200
Note: Credit is not given for both ENGL 3870 and COMM 3870
Meets General Education Requirement(s): IHIP
